name: io.github.Servosity/appdirect-mcp
title: AppDirect MCP
description: AppDirect marketplace operations with an offline mirror and cross-company billing reconciliation.

environmentVariables.name: APPDIRECT_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Set the APPDIRECT_CLIENT_ID credential for the AppDirect MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: APPDIRECT_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Set the APPDIRECT_CLIENT_SECRET credential for the AppDirect MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: APPDIRECT_OAUTH_SCOPE
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Overrides the OAuth2 scope sent to AppDirect (default: ROLE_PARTNER ROLE_PARTNER_READ).
